value.found_quote: Install the security-guidance plugin to have Claude review its own code changes for vulnerabilities and fix them in the same session.
value.rationale: The page describes the security-guidance plugin as an in-session plugin that makes Claude review its own code changes for vulnerabilities and fix them in the same session. It details deterministic (per-edit string match) and model-backed (end-of-turn and commit reviews) layers, matching the claim. The page states it is available on all plans and runs automatically once installed, indicating active status.
